word: H3365 - יָקַר - yâqar - yaw-kar' - Be precious

sections.paragraph:
Original: יקר

Transliteration: yâqar

Phonetic: yaw-kar'

BDB Definition:

  1. to esteem, be prized, be valuable, be precious, be costly, be appraised
    1. (Qal)
      1. to be precious, be highly valued, be esteemed, be costly
      2. to be appraised
    2. (Hiphil) to make something precious

Origin: a primitive root

TWOT entry: 905

Part(s) of speech: Verb
